Name: Verify Address Entry Screen UI elements
Objective: To ensure all required UI elements are present and correctly displayed on the initial address entry screen.
Precondition: User has completed phone verification, entered Full Name and Date of Birth, and is navigated to the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Observe the "Enter Address" screen.
Expected Results: 1. A prominent "Address Search Input Field" is displayed. 2. A descriptive label like "Enter your address" is present above or within the input field. 3. A "Continue" button is present, initially disabled or enabled based on input state. 4. No address suggestion dropdown is visible initially.

Name: Verify "Address Search Input Field" placeholder text
Objective: To ensure the address search input field has appropriate placeholder text.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Observe the "Address Search Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "Address Search Input Field" displays a placeholder text such as "Search for address" or "Start typing your address".

Name: Verify "Continue" button initial state
Objective: To ensure the "Continue" button is initially disabled when no address is entered.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Observe the "Continue" button.
Expected Results: 1. The "Continue" button is disabled.

Name: Verify address search input field functionality
Objective: To ensure the user can type into the address search input field.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Type "123 Main Street".
Expected Results: 1. The cursor appears in the input field. 2. The entered text "123 Main Street" is displayed correctly in the input field.

Name: Verify debounce logic for API calls
Objective: To ensure the Melissa GEE API is called only after a pause in typing, preventing excessive calls.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Rapidly type "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy" into the "Address Search Input Field" without pausing. 2. Pause typing for a short duration (e.g., 500ms).
Expected Results: 1. No address suggestions appear immediately while typing rapidly. 2. After pausing, address suggestions appear, indicating the API call was triggered by the debounce logic.

Name: Verify API trigger with ~4 words input
Objective: To ensure the Melissa GEE API is triggered when approximately 4 words are entered.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. Address suggestions are displayed in a dropdown below the input field.

Name: Verify API trigger with ~50% expected address length
Objective: To ensure the Melissa GEE API is triggered when approximately 50% of the expected address length is reached.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Test Data: 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043 (assuming this is ~50% of a full address)
Steps: 1. Type "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. Address suggestions are displayed in a dropdown below the input field.

Name: Verify display of address suggestions
Objective: To ensure matched address suggestions are displayed correctly in a dropdown.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. A dropdown list of address suggestions appears below the input field. 2. Suggestions are clearly readable and distinct.

Name: Verify no suggestions for invalid input
Objective: To ensure no suggestions are displayed for an invalid or non-existent address.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "asdfghjkl123" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. No address suggestions are displayed. 2. The dropdown remains empty or disappears.

Name: Verify "No results found" message
Objective: To ensure an appropriate message is displayed when no address suggestions are found.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "asdfghjkl123" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. A "No results found" or similar message is displayed in the suggestion dropdown area.

Name: Verify selection of a suggested address
Objective: To ensure a user can select an address from the suggestions dropdown.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen, and suggestions are displayed.
Test Data: 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA (as a suggestion)
Steps: 1. Type "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. From the displayed suggestions, tap on "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA".
Expected Results: 1. The selected address is populated into the individual address fields on the "Address Edit Screen". 2. The screen transitions to the "Address Edit Screen".

Name: Verify display of mapped individual address fields
Objective: To ensure the selected address is correctly mapped and displayed in individual editable fields.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Test Data: Selected address: "1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA"
Steps: 1. Observe the "Address Edit Screen".
Expected Results: 1. Individual input fields are displayed for: "Street Name", "House / Building Number", "Unit", "Neighborhood", "City", "ZIP Code", "State / Territory", "Country". 2. Each field is pre-populated with the corresponding data from the selected address.

Name: Verify data mapping for Street Name
Objective: To ensure the 'Thoroughfare' Melissa field maps to 'Street Name' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "Street Name Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "Street Name Input Field" displays "Amphitheatre Pkwy".

Name: Verify data mapping for House / Building Number
Objective: To ensure the 'Premise' Melissa field maps to 'House / Building Number' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "House / Building Number Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "House / Building Number Input Field" displays "1600".

Name: Verify data mapping for Unit
Objective: To ensure the 'SubBuilding' Melissa field maps to 'Unit' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion (with unit) and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "Unit Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "Unit Input Field" displays "Apt 10I".

Name: Verify data mapping for Neighborhood
Objective: To ensure the 'DependentLocality' Melissa field maps to 'Neighborhood' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion (with neighborhood) and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "Neighborhood Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "Neighborhood Input Field" displays "Downtown".

Name: Verify data mapping for City
Objective: To ensure the 'Locality' Melissa field maps to 'City' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "City Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "City Input Field" displays "Mountain View".

Name: Verify data mapping for ZIP Code
Objective: To ensure the 'PostalCode' Melissa field maps to 'ZIP Code' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "ZIP Code Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "ZIP Code Input Field" displays "94043".

Name: Verify data mapping for State / Territory
Objective: To ensure the 'AdministrativeArea' Melissa field maps to 'State / Territory' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "State / Territory Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "State / Territory Input Field" displays "CA".

Name: Verify data mapping for Country
Objective: To ensure the 'ISO3166-3' Melissa field maps to 'Country' UI field.
Precondition: User has selected an address suggestion and is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Steps: 1. Observe the "Country Input Field".
Expected Results: 1. The "Country Input Field" displays "USA".

Name: Verify editability of Street Name field
Objective: To ensure the "Street Name" field is editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "Street Name Input Field". 2. Edit the text from "Amphitheatre Pkwy" to "Shoreline Blvd".
Expected Results: 1. The "Street Name Input Field" allows editing and displays "Shoreline Blvd".

Name: Verify editability of House / Building Number field
Objective: To ensure the "House / Building Number" field is editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "House / Building Number Input Field". 2. Edit the text from "1600" to "1700".
Expected Results: 1. The "House / Building Number Input Field" allows editing and displays "1700".

Name: Verify editability of Unit field
Objective: To ensure the "Unit" field is editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "Unit Input Field". 2. Edit the text from "Apt 10I" to "Unit 20J".
Expected Results: 1. The "Unit Input Field" allows editing and displays "Unit 20J".

Name: Verify editability of Neighborhood field
Objective: To ensure the "Neighborhood" field is editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "Neighborhood Input Field". 2. Edit the text from "Downtown" to "Uptown".
Expected Results: 1. The "Neighborhood Input Field" allows editing and displays "Uptown".

Name: Verify non-editability of City field
Objective: To ensure the "City" field is not editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "City Input Field". 2. Attempt to edit the text.
Expected Results: 1. The "City Input Field" does not allow editing (e.g., keyboard does not appear, text cannot be changed).

Name: Verify non-editability of ZIP Code field
Objective: To ensure the "ZIP Code" field is not editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "ZIP Code Input Field". 2. Attempt to edit the text.
Expected Results: 1. The "ZIP Code Input Field" does not allow editing.

Name: Verify non-editability of State / Territory field
Objective: To ensure the "State / Territory" field is not editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "State / Territory Input Field". 2. Attempt to edit the text.
Expected Results: 1. The "State / Territory Input Field" does not allow editing.

Name: Verify non-editability of Country field
Objective: To ensure the "Country" field is not editable.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a pre-populated address.
Steps: 1. Tap on the "Country Input Field". 2. Attempt to edit the text.
Expected Results: 1. The "Country Input Field" does not allow editing.

Name: Verify successful address verification (AV23+)
Objective: To ensure the user proceeds when Melissa ResultCode is AV23 or higher.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a valid address (e.g., selected from suggestions).
Steps: 1. Ensure all address fields are correctly populated. 2. Tap the "Continue" button.
Expected Results: 1. The system processes the address. 2. The user is navigated to the next onboarding step.

Name: Verify successful address verification (AV25)
Objective: To ensure the user proceeds when Melissa ResultCode is AV25.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with a valid address (e.g., selected from suggestions).
Steps: 1. Ensure all address fields are correctly populated. 2. Tap the "Continue" button.
Expected Results: 1. The system processes the address. 2. The user is navigated to the next onboarding step.

Name: Verify failed address verification (below AV23)
Objective: To ensure an error message is displayed and user is returned to edit screen when Melissa ResultCode is below AV23.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" with an address that will result in a low AV code.
Steps: 1. Enter or select an address that is known to return AV21 (e.g., a slightly incorrect but plausible address). 2. Tap the "Continue" button.
Expected Results: 1. An error message "The address you entered could not be verified. Please try again." is displayed. 2. The user remains on the "Address Edit Screen" or is returned to it.

Name: Verify error message UI for failed verification
Objective: To ensure the error message for failed verification is clear and visible.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen" after a failed verification attempt.
Steps: 1. Trigger a failed address verification (e.g., by entering an address with ResultCode below AV23).
Expected Results: 1. The error message "The address you entered could not be verified. Please try again." is clearly visible on the screen. 2. The message text is correct and formatted appropriately.

Name: Verify confirmation screen for edited unverified address
Objective: To ensure the confirmation screen appears when a user edits an address that then fails verification or is not found.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Edit Screen".
Test Data: Original Melissa address: "123 Main St", User edited: "123 Main St, Apt Z" (assume this makes it unverified)
Steps: 1. Select a verified address. 2. Edit an allowed field (e.g., "Unit" to "Apt Z") to make the address unverified by Melissa. 3. Tap the "Continue" button.
Expected Results: 1. The "Address Confirmation Screen" is displayed. 2. Two options are presented: "Proceed with the address entered/edited by the user" and "Select and proceed with the address recommended by Melissa".

Name: Verify "Proceed with user entered/edited address" option
Objective: To ensure selecting the user's edited address proceeds to the next step.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Confirmation Screen" after editing an address.
Steps: 1. On the "Address Confirmation Screen", tap the "Proceed with the address entered/edited by the user" button.
Expected Results: 1. The user's edited address is saved. 2. The user is navigated to the next onboarding step.

Name: Verify "Select and proceed with Melissa recommended address" option
Objective: To ensure selecting the Melissa recommended address proceeds to the next step with the original Melissa address.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Confirmation Screen" after editing an address.
Test Data: Original Melissa address: "123 Main St", User edited: "123 Main St, Apt Z"
Steps: 1. On the "Address Confirmation Screen", tap the "Select and proceed with the address recommended by Melissa" button.
Expected Results: 1. The original Melissa-verified address is saved. 2. The user is navigated to the next onboarding step.

Name: Verify "Go back to edit" option from confirmation screen
Objective: To ensure the user can return to the "Address Edit Screen" from the confirmation screen.
Precondition: User is on the "Address Confirmation Screen".
Steps: 1. On the "Address Confirmation Screen", tap a "Go Back" or similar button/gesture.
Expected Results: 1. The user is navigated back to the "Address Edit Screen" with the previously entered/edited address pre-populated.

Name: Verify behavior with empty input field
Objective: To ensure no suggestions are shown and "Continue" is disabled for an empty search field.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Ensure the "Address Search Input Field" is empty.
Expected Results: 1. No address suggestions are displayed. 2. The "Continue" button is disabled.

Name: Verify behavior with very short input (less than ~4 words)
Objective: To ensure API is not triggered and no suggestions are shown for very short input.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "123 Main" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. No address suggestions are displayed (assuming "123 Main" is less than the ~4 word threshold or 50% length).

Name: Verify behavior with special characters in search
Objective: To ensure the search handles special characters gracefully.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Steps: 1. Type "123 Main St #Apt" into the "Address Search Input Field". 2. Pause typing.
Expected Results: 1. Relevant address suggestions are displayed, or a "No results found" message if the input is too obscure. 2. The application does not crash or show errors.

Name: Verify behavior with very long input
Objective: To ensure the search handles very long inputs without UI issues or crashes.
Precondition: User is on the "Enter Address" screen.
Test Data: This is a very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very very
